description_long: This object is a rectangular, open-topped wooden filing cabinet with a dark, weathered finish and visible wood grain texture. The sides and front feature recessed rectangular handholds, allowing for easy lifting and carrying. The wood panels are joined with visible seams and subtle metallic fasteners at the corners, giving it a sturdy, utilitarian appearance. The interior is hollow, providing ample space for storing files or other items, and the open top allows for quick access. The surface shows signs of wear and discoloration, suggesting frequent use or exposure to the elements. This cabinet would fit well in a garage, workshop, or industrial urban setting.
description: A dark, weathered wooden filing cabinet with recessed handholds and an open top, showing visible wood grain and signs of use.
description_view_0: Front view showing a recessed rectangular handhold and the open top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the wood grain texture and the open interior, with no handhold visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with a recessed handhold and open top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with wood grain texture and open interior, no handhold visible.
